name: Abnormal Number of Emails to Invalid Recipients
notes: This rule triggers when numerous emails are sent to invalid recipients (invalid domain, unknown user, malformed address, etc.). This could indicate a brute force attempt to reach valid addresses.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Send Failure
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Abnormal Number of Emails to Invalid Recipients on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Send Failure
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: High Number of Emails to Invalid Recipients from the Same Source
Event description: Detects when numerous emails are sent to invalid email addresses from the same source.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Sender (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
